public_signal: Chongqing chiller lighthouse factory described by Midea as a full-process AI-empowered chiller lighthouse factory.
why_it_matters_for_cmms_eam: A chiller factory connects production assets, energy performance, quality data, and equipment maintenance. It is a strong proving ground for agents that coordinate asset health, energy optimization, spare parts, and policy-aware work orders.
agentic_use_case: AI-assisted compressor diagnostics and energy-aware maintenance planning

public_signal: SANY describes Changsha No. 18 Factory as a 100,000-square-meter intelligent manufacturing pilot factory and a lighthouse-factory benchmark for heavy industry.
why_it_matters_for_cmms_eam: Heavy equipment companies bridge factory maintenance, field service, telematics, warranty, and parts logistics. A CMMS/EAM MAS can coordinate plant agents and fleet-service agents around the same asset history.
agentic_use_case: Factory-to-field service loop for excavators, concrete pumps, and critical equipment fleets

sector: Power grid operations and transmission assets
public_signal: State Grid materials describe AI-assisted transmission-line inspection, drone image defect recognition, and large-scale intelligent inspection programs.
why_it_matters_for_cmms_eam: Grid operations are inspection-heavy, safety-critical, geographically distributed, and compliance-sensitive. This is exactly where intake, vision, asset-risk, policy, and dispatch agents need to collaborate under guardrails.
agentic_use_case: Drone inspection to defect classification to human-approved work order routing

sector: Rail transit equipment and lifecycle service
public_signal: CRRC describes SmartCare-style intelligent O&M integrating vehicle and ground data to provide lifecycle services that enhance operational safety and reduce maintenance cost.
why_it_matters_for_cmms_eam: Rail assets require long-life asset records, safety governance, predictive service, configuration management, and high-confidence approvals. MAS is useful because no single agent should own safety, parts, schedule, and root cause at once.
agentic_use_case: Rail-fleet O&M recommendation package with human safety review

sector: Industrial digital infrastructure and smart factories
public_signal: Huawei describes fully connected factory solutions that connect industrial equipment, integrate IT/OT data, and provide network foundations for upper-layer intelligent applications.
why_it_matters_for_cmms_eam: Multi-agent maintenance needs reliable context more than clever text generation. Connectivity, data integration, and edge/cloud infrastructure become the substrate on which asset agents and policy agents run.
agentic_use_case: Connected-factory data layer for agentic EAM and explainable maintenance decisions

sector: Oil, gas, refining, and process industry
public_signal: Sinopec public materials describe smart-factory construction, maturity assessment for intelligent manufacturing, and digital-intelligent transformation of refining enterprises.
why_it_matters_for_cmms_eam: Process industries need reliability-centered maintenance, shutdown planning, permits, MRO coordination, and strict safety approvals. MAS can turn weak signals into governed recommendations without bypassing policy.
agentic_use_case: Policy-aware maintenance and shutdown-planning copilots for process plants

sector: Industrial internet platform and lighthouse-factory enablement
public_signal: Haier describes COSMOPlat as an industrial internet platform covering intelligent factory construction, industrial intelligent technology, software/hardware integration, and energy management.
why_it_matters_for_cmms_eam: Industrial internet platforms create cross-factory data and process patterns. MAS for CMMS/EAM can reuse those patterns for knowledge capture, standardized work, energy-aware maintenance, and service feedback loops.
agentic_use_case: Cross-factory maintenance knowledge network and service feedback loop

sector: Battery manufacturing and new-energy industrial operations
public_signal: CATL describes intelligent manufacturing using AI, image recognition, machine learning, predictive algorithms, 5G, and lighthouse-factory practices.
why_it_matters_for_cmms_eam: Battery manufacturing has dense automation, quality-critical equipment, energy constraints, and high uptime expectations. Agentic EAM can coordinate inspection, maintenance, quality, energy, and parts constraints.
agentic_use_case: Quality-linked maintenance for highly automated battery factories
